title: TCK Manifest v2
description: JSON Schema for Tractus-X TestLab TCK manifests (kind: tck) using YAML Syntax v2. Validates structural shape per ADR-0010 and ADR-0021 (unified variables). Licensed under Apache-2.0: https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

kind.description: Manifest kind discriminator. Must be 'tck' for TCK manifests.

id.description: Unique TCK identifier. Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens/underscores.

tests.description: List of test file path references to execute.

description.description: Detailed description of what this TCK validates.

copyright_holders.description: Copyright holder statements (e.g., '2026 Catena-X Automotive Network e.V.').

tags.description: Categorization tags for filtering and grouping.

dataspace_version.description: Target dataspace version. 'saturn' = EDC v0.11+ / DSP 2025-1, 'jupiter' = EDC v0.8–0.10.

organization.description: Organization responsible for the standard (e.g., 'Catena-X Automotive Network e.V.').

variables.description: Environment variables (ADR-0021 unified-variables model). Either a simple key-value map referenced via ${{ env.<name> }}, or an array of typed variable definitions referenced via ${{ env.<id>.<field> }}. Complex prerequisites such as access policies are declared here with 'config/connector/policy'.

oneOf.description: Simple key-value form. Referenced via ${{ env.<name> }}.
Typed variable definitions. Referenced via ${{ env.<id>.<field> }}.

services.description: Array of service definitions. Each service has a name, uses, and with block.

schemas.description: Named schema references. Keys become referenceable schema identifiers.

testdata.description: Named test data file references with MIME types.

env.description: Environment configuration: variables, services, schemas, and testdata.

file.description: Relative file path to the JSON Schema file.
Relative file path to the test data file.

type.description: MIME type of the test data file (e.g., 'application/json', 'application/pdf').

uses.description: Service type from the service/ namespace (e.g., 'service/connector_service').

with.description: Service configuration parameters. Structure depends on the service type. May include auth block.

id.description: Unique variable identifier. Referenced via ${{ env.id.field }}.

uses.description: Variable capability. 'variable/type/<type>' declares a typed value (a constant 'value' or 'source: input' to prompt the user); 'config/connector/policy' declares a reusable access policy. Referenced via ${{ env.id.field }}.

name.description: Human-readable variable label shown in the UI.

with.description: Variable inputs: a constant 'value', or 'source: input' to prompt the user at runtime.

returns.description: Named output declarations produced by this variable. Referenced via ${{ env.id.field }}.

type.description: Data type of the returned value.

class.description: Semantic class for IDE variable filtering (e.g., 'url', 'bpn', 'policy').

label.description: Human-readable label for input variables. Shown in the input form.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for input variables. Shown as input hint.

id.description: Unique step identifier within this scope. Referenced via ${{ steps.id.field }}.

name.description: Human-readable step label displayed in the IDE.

with.description: Step input parameters. Values may use ${{ }} expressions for variable references.

returns.description: Named output declarations. Each key becomes a referenceable variable.

type.description: Data type of the returned value.

class.description: Semantic class for IDE variable filtering (e.g., 'uuid', 'asset_id', 'offer_id').

with.description: Assertion input parameters (e.g., input, operator, value).
